_shape: wide: one record per date, one column per instrument. Columns are keyed by the BARE symbol exactly as market_data_hub.extract.extract_returns emits them (DatetimeIndex + one column per requested symbol), NOT the canonical id. `instruments` lists the canonical lazydatacore ids the caller requested; a consumer maps bare column -> canonical id itself (this is what lazystats.io.datahub.load_returns does when building a ReturnDataset). Validated structurally by reconstructing a DatetimeIndex-ed DataFrame from `rows` and calling market_data_hub.lazydatacore.validate_wide_prices (return/price-agnostic).
